'''sanongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jihadisation|jihadisation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jihadisation|jihadisation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sanongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sænengeth|sænengeth]] || [[word:sænengej|sænengej]] || [[word:sænengesh|sænengesh]] || [[word:sænenge|sænenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sanonongoth|sanonongoth]] || [[word:sanonongoj|sanonongoj]] || [[word:sanonongosh|sanonongosh]] || [[word:sanonongo|sanonongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanongoth|sanongoth]] || [[word:sanongoj|sanongoj]] || [[word:sanongosh|sanongosh]] || [[word:sanongo|sanongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sanofngofth|sanofngofth]] || [[word:sanofngofj|sanofngofj]] || [[word:sanofngofsh|sanofngofsh]] || [[word:sanofngof|sanofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanongotho|sanongotho]] || [[word:sanongojo|sanongojo]] || [[word:sanongosho|sanongosho]] || [[word:sanongoko|sanongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanongoth|sanongoth]] || [[word:sanongoj|sanongoj]] || [[word:sanongosh|sanongosh]] || [[word:sanongo|sanongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanongothol|sanongothol]] || [[word:sanongojol|sanongojol]] || [[word:sanongoshol|sanongoshol]] || [[word:sanongokol|sanongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanongoothotho|sanongoothotho]] || [[word:sanongoojojo|sanongoojojo]] || [[word:sanongooshosho|sanongooshosho]] || [[word:sanongooko|sanongooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanongothon|sanongothon]] || [[word:sanongojon|sanongojon]] || [[word:sanongoshon|sanongoshon]] || [[word:sanongokon|sanongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanongothooro|sanongothooro]] || [[word:sanongojooro|sanongojooro]] || [[word:sanongoshooro|sanongoshooro]] || [[word:sanongokooro|sanongokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
